M1033_HOSP_RISK_5PLUS_MDCTN M1033 (M1032) Risk For Hosp - Taking 5 Or More Meds This field is checked if the patient is at risk for hospitalization due to taking 5 or more medications. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x
M1033_HOSP_RISK_EXHAUSTION M1033 Risk For Hosp - Exhaustion This field is checked if the patient is at risk for hospitalization due to current exhaustion. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x
M1033_HOSP_RISK_OTHR M1033 (M1032) Risk
